Welcome back

Hi, Advisor 👋

Create clear, student-ready updates and see what students use.

0 Live posts
0 Resources
0 Student clicks
0 Expiring soon

Create New Bulletin

Use Posts for announcements, events, trainings, and opportunities.
1 · Pick a category 2 · Write it simply 3 · Preview
Form Completion
0%
💡

Quick Resource Posting

Use Resources for important links students may need again later.

Examples: immigration help, jobs, housing, clinics, legal aid.

📋

Required Information

These fields are mandatory for all bulletins

A clear, descriptive title helps students understand the opportunity
Choose the most appropriate category for this bulletin
This helps students know who posted the information
Optional — if left blank, the English title will show for Spanish speakers
🔗

Resource Details

Keep this simple: paste the link, name it clearly, and publish.

Use short, familiar words students will recognize quickly.
Recommended for bilingual display. If left blank, English will be reused.
Choose a simple icon students can recognize on the resource bubble.
Paste the website students should open when they tap the resource.
Comma-separated. Max 3 short phrases shown as scannable bullet points.
Show this resource to students now
✨

Recommended Details

These fields make your bulletin more helpful and engaging

Add details so students know why this opportunity matters to them
Optional — if left blank, the English description will show for Spanish speakers
The organization offering the opportunity
Which student groups would benefit most from this opportunity?
Add a URL for more details or registration. The link will be clickable for students.
How can students get more information or apply?
📅

Event & Timing Details

Add dates so items appear on the student Calendar and Home “Upcoming” list. Any advisor with an @ebhcs.org login can post.

Tip: choose Event date (or deadline / range) below. Use shortcuts for typical school posts.

What type of date information is most relevant?
How will this event be conducted?
🖼️

Visual Enhancement

Make your bulletin stand out with an image

Upload a logo, flyer, or relevant image. Use JPG/PNG/GIF/WebP under 10MB (large posters are auto-resized; aim for ≤1MB and around 800×600px).
Upload a PDF flyer, form, or information sheet. Maximum file size: 10MB.

Manage Your Content

Preview

New post

Student preview

Start typing a title and summary to preview what students will see.

Last 30 days

Top student actions

Stats will appear once students start opening posts. Share the link to get things going!

Top posts

Your most-viewed posts will show up here after students start clicking.

Top categories

Which topics students click most will appear here.
